feat.name: Set-up Strike
feat.text: Your attack makes it difficult for your enemy to defend themselves against your allies' attacks. Attempt a Strike against an enemy. If the Strike is successful, the target is off guard against the next attack that one of your allies attempts against it before the start of your next turn.

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.
